propertyIssueSummary.headline: Moisture-related issues were observed across multiple parts of the property, with repeated links to bathroom-side defects, plumbing concerns, and some external-side exposure.
keyPoints: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Hall of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Hall Skirting level Dampness

Observed dampness at the skirting level of the Common Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Bedroom Skirting level Dampness

Observed dampness at the skirting level of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Master bedroom Skirting level Dampness

Observed dampness at the skirting level of Kitchen of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Kitchen Skirting level Dampness

Observed dampness & efflorescence on the wall surface of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed cracks on the External wall of building near Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Master bedroom wall damness

areaWiseObservations.observation: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Hall of Flat No. 103. Supporting exposed-side finding: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103. Area sheet detail: Hall Skirting level Dampness

severity.label: Medium
severity.reasoning: Visible dampness, cracks, or open tile joints point to a recurring issue that needs repair.

recommendedActions: Open and re-grout the affected tile joints and check for hollow or loose tiles.
